| Date           |                                          |
|----------------|------------------------------------------|
| ~~May 27~~     | ~~**Open for abstract submission**~~     |
| ~~Jun 19~~     | ~~**Open for registration**~~            |
| Jul 9          | **Closing date for abstract submission** |
| Aug 4          | **Notify acceptance of abstracts**       |
| Aug 28         | **Close for early bird registration**    |
| Nov 30         | **Pre-conference Workshops**             |
| Dec 1 - 4      | **Conference**                           |
